title: rouliniella
intro: Rouliniella is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family, that is native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rouliniella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the development of malaria. Herbal preparations of Rouliniella often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
